title: Crystal Damage Sound
description: This set of resources replaces the usual sounds when dealing damage with crystal sounds.
body:
This resource pack will replace the usual sounds of taking damage with crystal ones. Every time you take damage, you will hear the crackling of crystals, as if your crystalline body shell has been damaged.
![Example Of Damage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efd2e0222edcccf8a94af06c2be7c6f0e1df1b20.png)
